caption: A man with short dark hair, wearing a grey suit jacket, a white shirt, and a patterned tie, is giving a presentation. He stands before a white backdrop featuring the hashtag "#BigDataSV 2015" repeated twice. In the initial stages, he gestures with both hands while looking slightly downward toward a laptop positioned in front of him. As the sequence progresses, he looks forward and speaks, continuing to gesture with his hands. A blue lower-third graphic appears across the bottom of the screen, displaying the text "JEFF KELLY I @jeffreykelly," followed by "Senior Analyst" and "Wikbon" in smaller font. To the left of this text, a logo for "NFO-OBJECTS" is visible. The scene transitions from the man focusing on his equipment to engaging with his audience, with the informational graphic becoming a permanent fixture on the screen.
